hints.text: Coverage car = a **pickup truck** (cab + bed visible; Gen3 has a roof rack; sometimes a huge blur)
A **police follow car** (usually white or black) is almost always behind the Street View car
**Short plates** that look somewhat **green** through the blur
Poles concrete with **indents + a few horizontal supports** (like Brazil's, but no holes through them)
Roads often **unmarked / faded / potholed / unpaved** (poorly maintained)
Houses single-storey w/ **steep metal-sheet roofs** + cinder-block compound walls
**City & state names on storefronts and banners** → very useful for region-guessing
**Shitcam** (Nigeria is the only mainland-African country with it; 2023–25 coverage is extra low-quality, only otherwise in Lebanon)
Fairly flat; **Christian south / Muslim north**; climate tropical (S) → savannah (centre) → arid steppe (N); some states have yellow tuk-tuks; Kaduna haystacks; monolithic rocks around Abuja
